description: Private-tier post. Audience-gated via the required audienceList reference; never federated; visible only to requesters in the audience list. The presence of audienceList is what structurally distinguishes private from public per §5.4.

audienceList.description: Required AT-URI reference to the audience list governing visibility. Consulted at read time; membership changes on the referenced audience apply retroactively to records carrying this reference (§5.4 structural validation rule for private-tier lexicons; KRYPHOCRON_CRATE_DESIGN.md §read-time consultation + retroactive membership).

publicCompanion.description: Optional AT-URI pointing at a paired public-tier record (the public side of a dual-faced post). The linkage lives only on the kryphocron-side record; the public-side record carries no kryphocron-visible markers. When absent, the post is a standalone private post with no public companion.
